summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Itihaasa Foods premium cafe website. Tested mobile-first QR code experience (375px) and desktop responsiveness (1920px). All core functionality working excellently including menu filtering, navigation, modals, and brand display.

design_issues.issue: Frappe category displays 11 items instead of expected 8 items - possible data categorization issue in menuData.js

console_warnings.issue: Console warnings about AnimatePresence mode='wait' with multiple children - causes visual behavior warnings but doesn't break functionality

passed_tests: Hero section displays all 3 brand logos correctly (Itihaasa Foods, Fresh Bean, Bean & Brew)
View Menu button scrolls to menu section smoothly
Navigation sticky behavior on scroll works perfectly
All 10 menu categories functional with proper item filtering
Menu items display with name, description, and price correctly
Menu item modal opens and closes properly with full content
Mobile hamburger menu opens and closes correctly
Mobile horizontal scroll for categories works smoothly
About section displays at bottom with cafe image
Footer links scroll to respective sections
Typography uses Playfair Display for headings and Lato for body text
Color scheme matches requirements (Dark Espresso Brown #3E2723, Ivory Beige #FFF8E1)
Mobile responsiveness excellent at 375px (primary QR code use case)
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
All images load successfully without errors
Smooth animations work throughout (fade-in, hover effects)
No critical errors or broken functionality
action_item_for_main_agent: Optional minor fixes: 1) Review frappe category data filtering in menuData.js (showing 11 vs expected 8 items). 2) Consider changing AnimatePresence mode from 'wait' to 'popLayout' in MenuSection.js to remove console warnings. These are very minor issues that don't impact user experience.

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All core functionality working, minor data/animation warnings only
success_percentage.overall: 98% - Outstanding implementation with minor optimizations possible
